title: Comet Squadron

{{Quote|Flew two missions with Colonel, I mean General, Crespin's Comet Group and had to punch out or eat a bomber torpedo.|Garik Loran|<ref name="WS" />}}
'''Comet Squadron''', also known as '''Comet Group''', was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that served the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The squadron was equipped with [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing interceptors]] and was under the command of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Edor Crespin]]. Some time before [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], [[Garik Loran|Garik "Face" Loran]], a former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] star, joined the squadron after buying his own A-wing and flew only two missions with the [[unit]]. Colonel Crespin was promoted to [[General/Legends|general]] while still leading the squadron before being given command of the [[Folor Base|fighter training base]] on [[Folor]] in around 7 ABY.

==History==
Comet Squadron,<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|135|Comet Squadron}}</ref> also known as Comet Group, was an [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] in the service of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]]. During the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the squadron was under the command of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Edor Crespin]].<ref name="WS" />

Some time before [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]],<ref name="TERC" /> the former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] star [[Garik Loran|Garik "Face" Loran]] joined Comet Squadron after purchasing his own A-wing. Loran flew two missions with Comet Squadron<ref name="WS" /> before he was forced to eject from his starfighter during an [[Unidentified Comet Squadron mission|operation]] in order to avoid a [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]].<ref name="CSWE2">{{CSWECite|II|261|Loran, Garik "Face"}}</ref> Loran then left the squadron and purchased an [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]].<ref name="WS" />

While in command of Comet Squadron, Crespin was promoted to the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[General/Legends|general]].<ref name="CSWE" /> Around 7 ABY,<ref name="TERC" /> General Crespin was placed in command of the [[Folor Base|fighter training base]] on [[Folor]], one of the [[Moon/Legends|moons]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]], and took personal command of the base's two A-wing training squadrons.<ref name="WS" />

==Equipment==
The [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] of Comet Squadron were equipped with RZ-1 A-wing interceptors,<ref name="CSWE" /> the fastest starfighter in the service of the New Republic.<ref name="SotG">[[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|''Starships of the Galaxy'', Saga Edition]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Comet Squadron was first mentioned as "Comet Group" in the fifth novel in the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|''X-Wing'']] series, [[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron|''Wraith Squadron'']], written by [[Aaron Allston]] and published in [[February]] [[1998]].<ref name="WS" /> It later gained an entry in the [[2008]] reference book ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'',<ref name="CSWE" /> as well as being mentioned under the entry for Garik Loran.<ref name="CSWE2" /> Both entries identified the unit as "Comet Squadron."<ref name="CSWE" /><ref name="CSWE2" />
